objectiveEn: About one hour. Learn 20 place and direction words, There is / There are grammar, reading, listening, speaking, and homework.
objectiveMn: Ойролцоогоор 1 цаг. 20 шинэ үг, There is / There are дүрэм, сонсох, ярих, гэрийн даалгавар.
contentEn: Learn vocabulary for places and directions while practicing 'There is' and 'There are' to describe what exists in a place.
contentMn: Газар, чиглэлийн үгсийг сурч, аль нэг газарт юу байгааг тайлбарлахдаа There is / There are хэрэглэхийг дадлагажуулна.

vocabulary.example: My school is big.
The hospital is near here.
I go to the shop every day.
The restaurant is expensive.
The park is beautiful.
The bank is near the school.
I study at the library.
The bus stop is near here.
Our school is on this street.
Ulaanbaatar is a big city.
The school is near my house.
The hospital is far from here.
Turn left at the corner.
The bank is on the right.
Go straight for two minutes.
The park is next to the school.
The bank is behind the shop.
The bus stop is in front of us.
Where is the hospital?
How far is the bank?

quiz.question: Make a question: '_____ a park near here?'
quiz.explanation: Question form: Is there + singular noun.

quiz.question: Are there restaurants near Sarnai's school?
quiz.explanation: Sarnai says 'There are two restaurants on the next street.'

quiz.question: Which direction does Sarnai tell Bat to turn?
Where is the bank in the listening?
quiz.explanation: She says 'there is a bank right next to it.'

quiz.question: How many shops are near Sarnai's house?
What is the overall topic of the listening?
quiz.explanation: The dialogue is about finding places and giving directions.

page1.grammarTopic: There is / There are — describing what exists in a place
page1.grammarExplanation: 'There is' describes ONE thing that exists. 'There are' describes MULTIPLE things. Used to describe places, give directions, and talk about neighborhoods. Short form: There's = There is. Negative: There isn't (singular) / There aren't (plural). Question: Is there? / Are there? 'There is' нэг зүйл байгааг харуулдаг. 'There are' олон зүйл байгааг харуулдаг. Газар байршил, чиглэл өгөхөд хэрэглэгддэг. Үгүйсгэл: There isn't / There aren't. Асуулт: Is there? / Are there?
commonMistakes: There are a school. → There is a school.
There is two banks. → There are two banks.
Is there banks? → Are there banks?
There have a park. → There is a park.

page2.readingPassage: My neighborhood is very convenient. There is a big school near my house. Next to the school, there is a beautiful park. There are three shops on my street. There is also a small restaurant with delicious food. The hospital is a little far, but there is a bus stop in front of my house. I love my neighborhood!

keyPhrases.english: There is a school near my house
Is there a bank near here?

speakingQuestions: 1. Is there a school near your house?
2. Are there any shops on your street?
3. Is there a park in your neighborhood?
4. How far is the nearest hospital?
5. Is there a bus stop near here?
6. Give me directions from your house to your school!

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: Excuse me! Is there a bank near here?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: Yes! There is a bank on the next street.

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: It's not far. Go straight and turn left.

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: Are there any restaurants near here?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: Yes! There are two restaurants on this street.

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: Thank you so much for your help!

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: You're welcome! Have a nice day!

page2.speakingTip: Don't worry about mistakes — just keep talking! Every mistake helps you learn faster. Confidence is more important than perfection at this stage.

page3.listeningScript: Bat: Sarnai, is there a good restaurant near your school? Sarnai: Yes! There are two restaurants on the next street. Bat: How do I get there? Sarnai: Go straight for two minutes, then turn right. Bat: Is there a bank near the restaurant? Sarnai: Yes, there is a bank right next to it. Very convenient! Bat: Are there any shops near your house? Sarnai: Yes! There are three shops and a beautiful park five minutes away.

listeningQuestions.question: Are there restaurants near Sarnai's school?
How long to walk to restaurant?
How many shops near Sarnai's house?
Is there a park near her house?
Does Bat want to find a restaurant?
What does Sarnai say about the bank?

homework: Writing: Draw a simple map of your neighborhood and label 5 places in English.
Vocabulary: Write 5 sentences using 'There is' and 5 using 'There are'.
Speaking: Practice giving directions from your house to your school.
Review: Ask someone: 'Is there a [place] near here?'
answerKey: Fill in blanks: 1-There is · 2-There are · 3-There is · 4-There are · 5-Is there · 6-Are there
completionSummary: Mastered There is / There are grammar
Learned to ask where places are
